heroDescription.processed: Glass Tides is a four-piece indie electronic band from Bristol, UK. Our fifth studio album Parallax is available now on all platforms. Featuring the singles "Hollow Light" and "Everything Fades."
heroDescription.summary: Glass Tides is a four-piece indie electronic band from Bristol, UK. Our fifth studio album Parallax is available now on all platforms. Featuring the singles "Hollow Light" and "Everything Fades."

ctaDescription.processed: The Parallax World Tour kicks off in March 2026. 48 cities across North America, Europe, and Asia. Pre-sale tickets available now for newsletter subscribers.
ctaDescription.summary: The Parallax World Tour kicks off in March 2026. 48 cities across North America, Europe, and Asia. Pre-sale tickets available now for newsletter subscribers.
